SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN try_cast(replace(amount, '$', '') AS DOUBLE) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unparseable_amount_rows FROM orders

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS n FROM orders GROUP BY status ORDER BY n DESC
